case_title: SF COMPREHRENSIVE SHUTTLE TOURS VS. SCOTT W. HARRIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY SF COMPREHRENSIVE SHUTTLE TOURS AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, SCOTT W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($65.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED DEC-16-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, SCOTT W.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE, DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE, FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT W. HARRIS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS SCHEDULED TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE AT TODAYS HEARING. COURT CALL PERSONNEL--ROCHELLE INFORMED THE CLERK THAT COURT CALL WAS CANCELLED BY DEFENDANT; AS CASE IS IN THE PROCESS OF BEING SETTLED.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT HARRIS FOR TELEPHONIC HEARING FILED AND PLACED IN COURT FILE.
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE.
